query: I want a full system audit — infrastructure, auth, deployment pipeline, data handling, all of it
run a system audit before we go live — I need to know what we're missing across the whole stack
something is wrong at the system level and I can't isolate it — can you do a comprehensive review?
we're scaling up and I want to audit our system design end to end before we hit the next order of magnitude
do a system-wide health check — I want to know where the single points of failure are
I need a cross-cutting audit: observability, alerting, deployment, rollback — is our system production-grade?
run system-audit — we just had an incident and I want to understand the systemic gaps that allowed it
I want to audit everything from the database to the CDN — I'm not looking for one specific thing, I want the full picture
our system has been growing organically for 2 years and I think there are hidden landmines — can you do a structural audit?
before we raise our Series A I want a rigorous system audit so I know what we're walking into
harden our API — I specifically want injection points, auth gaps, and rate limiting reviewed
scan our codebase for coupling and complexity issues
audit our AI SDK usage — specifically how we're using streamText and generateObject
I want to audit just our developer experience — tooling, setup friction, documentation
check our npm dependencies for vulnerabilities
audit our AI prompts and agent pipeline for structural issues
run a security-only audit — I want to know our OWASP posture before the pen test
I want to explore whether our system architecture has deep parallels to biological immune systems
check our frontend codebase for anti-patterns
I want to validate a specific decision: did we make the right call going with serverless for the processing pipeline?
